name: playwright-fw
description: Playwright JS Test Automation Framework with Allure Reporting

scripts.test:prod: cross-env HEADED=true ENV=prod npx playwright test
scripts.test:beta: cross-env HEADED=true ENV=beta npx playwright test
scripts.test:stage: cross-env HEADED=true ENV=stage npx playwright test
scripts.test:test: cross-env HEADED=true ENV=test npx playwright test
scripts.test:prod:report: npm run test:prod && npm run allure:report
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
